notes_zh:
### ✨ 新增

- **新增** 自动化规则（自定义规则）按触发方式分组显示：自动、手动、已禁用，方便快速定位常用规则
- **新增** 富文本剪贴板条目现在支持编辑：进入编辑自动获取焦点、ESC 取消、有独立背景色区分，保存时会提示「格式将丢失」并转为纯文本（#33，感谢 @bingoohuang 的 PR）

### 🪄 优化

- **优化** Toast 弹出/收起改用 spring 动画，滑动更自然
- **优化** Toast 不同变体（操作、普通）的 pill 高度现已统一

### 🛠 修复

- **修复** 永久保存分组的「清空条目」菜单现已禁用，避免困惑（#37，感谢 @miniers 的 PR）
- **修复** 就地编辑条目保存后，底部属性里的字数、行数、词数没有随之刷新
- **修复** 手动规则的「触发时弹窗确认」开关实际不生效；手动触发本就是主动操作，开关已移除（#35，感谢 @xream 的反馈）
notes_en:
### ✨ New

- **New** Custom automation rules are now grouped by trigger mode (Automatic / Manual / Disabled) for faster lookup
- **New** Rich-text clips are now editable — the editor auto-focuses on entry, `Esc` cancels, edit mode has a dedicated background, and saving shows a "formatting will be lost" warning before converting to plain text (#33, thanks @bingoohuang for the PR)

### 🪄 Improvements

- **Improve** Toast enter/exit now uses a spring animation for a more natural slide
- **Improve** Toast pills now share a consistent height across action and plain variants

### 🛠 Fixes

- **Fix** The "Clear items" menu is now disabled for preserved groups to prevent confusion (#37, thanks @miniers for the PR)
- **Fix** Character / line / word counts in the properties panel now refresh after an in-place edit
- **Fix** The "Confirm before applying" toggle on manual rules was a no-op; since manual triggers are already explicit, the toggle has been removed (#35, thanks @xream for the report)
